Listen to the following conversation.
Hi Marcus, I reserved Room 4 for the client meeting tomorrow at two, but the calendar now shows a training session there.
Oh, facilities moved the training at the last minute. Sorry, I should have told you. Rooms 6 and 7 are both free tomorrow afternoon.
Room 6 doesn't have a video screen, and we need to show the new product demo. I'll take Room 7.
Good choice. I'll update the calendar right away and e-mail the client the new room number.

questions.prompt: What problem does the woman mention?

options.A: A meeting room is no longer available

questions.explanation: She reserved Room 4, but the calendar now shows a training session there instead.

questions.prompt: Why does the woman choose Room 7?

options.A: It is closer to her office

questions.explanation: She rejects Room 6 because it has no video screen and she needs to show a product demo.

questions.prompt: What will the man most likely do next?

options.C: Update the calendar and e-mail the client

questions.explanation: He says he will update the calendar right away and e-mail the client the new room number.

segments.text: Listen to the following conversation.
Thanks for calling Beacon Catering. How can I help you?
Hi, this is Elena from Stratford Design. I'd like to order lunch for a client workshop on Thursday — sandwiches and salads for eighteen people.
Certainly. We have a lunch package at twelve dollars per person, and delivery is free for orders over two hundred dollars.
That works. Could you deliver at eleven thirty? The workshop starts at noon, and I'd like time to set up.

options.B: To order food for a workshop

questions.explanation: She wants to order sandwiches and salads for a client workshop on Thursday.

questions.prompt: Why does the woman ask for an eleven thirty delivery?

options.A: She wants time to set up

questions.explanation: The workshop starts at noon, and she would like time to set up beforehand.

segments.text: Listen to the following conversation.
Hi Priya, my laptop keeps disconnecting from the wireless network — it's the third time this morning, and I'm in the middle of a video call with the Osaka office.
We've had several reports from the fourth floor today. A network switch is failing, and the replacement part arrives this afternoon.
Is there anything I can do in the meantime? My call resumes in twenty minutes.
Use the wired connection at the hot desks on the third floor — those ports are on a different switch. I'll send you a cable adapter.

questions.prompt: What problem does the man report?

options.B: He keeps losing the wireless connection

questions.explanation: His laptop has disconnected from the wireless network three times in one morning.

questions.prompt: According to the woman, what is causing the problem?
questions.explanation: She says a network switch is failing and the replacement part arrives that afternoon.

questions.prompt: What does the woman suggest the man do?

options.D: Use a wired connection on the third floor

questions.explanation: She tells him to use the wired connection at the third-floor hot desks, which are on a different switch.

segments.text: Listen to the following telephone message.
Hello, this message is for Ms. Chen. This is Robert from Lakeside Auto Service. Your car is ready for pickup — we replaced the brake pads and rotated the tires, and everything checked out fine.
The total comes to two hundred forty dollars, a bit less than the estimate, because the parts arrived on sale. We're open until six tonight and from eight to five on Saturday.
If you'd like, we can also arrange a shuttle from your office — just call us back at five five five, zero one nine three. Thank you.

questions.explanation: He calls from Lakeside Auto Service about brake pads, tire rotation, and a repair total.

questions.prompt: Why is the total lower than the estimate?

questions.prompt: What does the speaker offer to arrange?

options.C: A shuttle from the listener's office

questions.explanation: He offers to arrange a shuttle from Ms. Chen's office if she calls back.

segments.text: Listen to the following announcement.

Attention, Fairway Market shoppers. This weekend we're celebrating our twentieth anniversary with savings throughout the store. All bakery items are twenty percent off, and the first fifty customers each morning receive a free reusable shopping bag.
Don't forget to visit our new coffee corner near the main entrance, where you can sample our house blend for free until noon today.
And remember, the pharmacy counter now stays open until nine on weeknights. Thank you for shopping at Fairway Market.

questions.prompt: What is the store celebrating?
questions.explanation: The announcement says the store is celebrating its twentieth anniversary this weekend.

questions.prompt: What will the first fifty customers receive each morning?
questions.explanation: The first fifty customers each morning receive a free reusable shopping bag.

questions.prompt: What is located near the main entrance?
questions.explanation: Shoppers are invited to visit the new coffee corner near the main entrance.

segments.text: Listen to the following excerpt from a meeting.

Before we wrap up, a quick update on the office renovation. Painting on the fifth floor begins next Monday, so everyone seated there will move to temporary desks on the second floor for about two weeks.

Please pack your personal items into the crates by Friday evening; the moving crew handles everything else over the weekend. Your phone extensions and computers will work as usual at the temporary desks.
If you have equipment that needs special handling, e-mail Facilities by Thursday so they can plan for it.

questions.prompt: What is the announcement mainly about?
questions.explanation: Fifth-floor staff will move to temporary desks on the second floor during the renovation.

questions.prompt: What should listeners do by Friday evening?
questions.explanation: Staff are asked to pack their personal items into the crates by Friday evening.

questions.prompt: Why should some listeners e-mail Facilities?

options.B: To get a new phone extension
options.C: To report equipment that needs special handling
options.D: To volunteer for the moving crew

questions.explanation: Anyone with equipment needing special handling should e-mail Facilities by Thursday.

segments.text: Listen to the following announcement.
Good afternoon, employees. The main parking lot will be resurfaced this Thursday and Friday, so please use the north lot behind Building B during that time.
Security staff will direct traffic from seven to nine each morning, and shuttle vans will run every ten minutes between the north lot and the front entrance.
If you usually bike to work, the bicycle racks near the front gate will remain open. Thank you for your cooperation.

questions.prompt: What is the announcement mainly about?
questions.explanation: The main parking lot will be resurfaced, so employees must use another lot.

questions.prompt: Where should drivers park?
questions.explanation: They should use the north lot behind Building B.

questions.prompt: How often will shuttle vans run?
questions.explanation: Shuttle vans will run every ten minutes.

Bring a small soil sample to our information desk any Saturday before noon, and our staff will recommend fertilizer and planting schedules.
Customers who purchase seeds on the same day receive ten percent off gardening tools. Visit us on Route 6 next to the post office.

If you need to reschedule, call us by four o clock on Friday to avoid a late cancellation fee.
